sections.heading: Circular No: ID 18/24
sections.title: MAS publishes AI model risk management information paper for insurers
sections.summary: The Monetary Authority of Singapore (MAS) released an information paper outlining good practices for AI model risk management, specifically targeting licensed insurers and Lloyd's Asia Scheme members. The paper focuses on governance, oversight, risk management systems, and AI development/deployment practices observed during a thematic review of financial institutions' AI practices in mid-2024. MAS encourages financial institutions to adopt these practices when developing and deploying AI systems.
sections.dtia_summary: This information paper provides guidance on AI model risk management practices relevant to data processing activities involving AI systems, which may impact data transfer considerations when deploying AI models across borders.

requirements.text: MAS published an information paper on AI model risk management for licensed insurers and Lloyd's Asia Scheme
The information paper focuses on governance and oversight of AI model risk management
The information paper covers key risk management systems and processes for AI development and deployment
MAS encourages financial institutions to reference these good practices when developing and deploying AI

sections.source_quote:
Circular No: ID 18/24
5 December 2024
To Chief Executives
All Licensed Insurers and Lloyd's Asia Scheme
MAS has published an information paper on "Artificial Intelligence (AI) Model Risk Management"
